first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations, and the core reasoning remains unchanged. Both versions correctly identify the same strengths (staff-level seniority, MCP experience) and the same critical weaknesses (lack of Python, insufficient years of production AI experience, no mention of RAG/vector DBs). The minor differences in wording, such as calculating the experience as "15+ years" versus "17+ years", are well within the bounds of normal stylistic variation and do not alter the substantive assessment. The model did not react to the significant demographic change of moving all job locations to India, indicating it focused solely on the candidate's skills and experience.
